auth.forgotPasswordHelp: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.inviteInvalidHelp: Ask the admin who invited you to send a fresh link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyBody: Domain UI lands in phases 03 and onwards.
dashboard.slaOverdue: {count, plural, one {# lead is past its SLA} other {# leads are past their SLA}}
dashboard.todaysMoves: {count, plural, =0 {Today's moves} one {Today's moves (#)} other {Today's moves (#)}}
dashboard.noMovesToday: No moves on the board today.
dashboard.invoices: {count, plural, =0 {No invoices} one {# invoice} other {# invoices}}
dashboard.profitReviewPending: {count, plural, one {# completed job awaiting profit review} other {# completed jobs awaiting profit review}}
dashboard.callbacksDueToday: {count, plural, one {# call-back scheduled for today} other {# call-backs scheduled for today}}

users.title: Team & access
users.subtitle: Invite teammates, manage roles, revoke access.

customers.title: Customers
customers.totalCount: {count, plural, =0 {No customers yet} one {# customer} other {# customers}}
customers.newSubtitle: Create an individual or business customer.
customers.confirmDelete: Soft-delete this customer? Their jobs stay; the customer is hidden from the list.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.totalCount: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs yet} one {# job} other {# jobs}}
jobs.confirmDelete: Soft-delete this job? It is hidden from the list but the audit trail stays.
jobs.contractTooltip: Customer accepted this quote — figure is the contract value.
jobs.surveyorNeeded: Pick a surveyor on the Edit page.
jobs.comingSoonBody: Quote, schedule, photos, money tabs land in later phases.
jobs.terminalStage: This job is in a terminal stage. Re-engagement creates a new job.

requote.title: Quote again
requote.help: Spins up a fresh lead linked to this job. Estimating quantities are carried over so the new quote opens half-prefilled.
requote.notesPlaceholder: Anything the rep should know before they re-engage…

error.invalid_input: Check the form fields and try again.
error.wrong_stage: Only finished jobs can be requoted.
error.no_capacity: No sales rep with capacity right now.
error.unknown: Couldn't create the new lead. Try again.

profitReview.title: Profit review
profitReview.heading: Profit review
profitReview.invoices: {count, plural, =0 {no invoices} one {# paid invoice} other {# paid invoices}}
profitReview.wrongStage: Profit review opens once a job reaches the completed stage.
profitReview.lockedHelp: This review is finalised. Costs are locked.

error.invalid_input: Check the cost fields and try again.
error.wrong_stage: Profit review opens once the job is completed.
error.locked: This review is finalised and can't be edited.
error.forbidden: Only admins can finalise a review.
error.version_conflict: Someone else updated this job. Reload the page and try again.

profitDashboard.title: Profit
profitDashboard.pendingReview: {count, plural, one {# job awaiting profit review} other {# jobs awaiting profit review}}
profitDashboard.jobsHeading: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs in this window} one {# job} other {# jobs}}
profitDashboard.empty: No completed jobs in this window yet.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Single source of truth. Save broadcasts to every quote-generating surface.
pricing.label: Label
pricing.editorComingSoon: The full visual editor lands in the next slice. The publish API, KV broadcast, and simulator are already live.
pricing.matrixEditorComingSoon: The matrix and collection editors (margins, sizes, complications, distance bands) land in the next slice. Scalar edits and publishing already work.
pricing.editSubtitle: Adjust labels, hourly rates, validity, and the dynamic-pricing flag. Publishing creates a new version and broadcasts to KV.
pricing.matrixSubtitle: Tune the gross-margin percentage for each size × distance band. Publishing creates a new version and broadcasts to KV.
pricing.matrixHelp: Margins are gross-margin percentages applied to crew + van labour cost. Pass-through (fuel, insurance, waste) is added at cost.
pricing.noActiveForEdit: No active pricing version. Seed one first.
pricing.inheritedFromActive: Inherited from the active version (edit later via the matrix editor):
pricing.alreadySeeded: Pricing already seeded — nothing to do.
pricing.simulatorSubtitle: Run a quote against the active pricing version. Read-only — nothing is saved.
pricing.simulatorEmpty: Pick a size, distance, and any complications, then run the simulation.
pricing.noActiveForSimulator: No active pricing version. Seed one first.
pricing.complicationsHelp: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple.
pricing.surveyRequired: Complications threshold reached — survey required before final quote.

quotes.empty: No quotes captured yet for this job.
quotes.builderSubtitle: Snapshots the active pricing version. Save creates a draft quote on this job.
quotes.builderRevisingFrom: Revising from Rev. {number}. Tweak inputs and save — the original is preserved as history.
quotes.builderComplicationsHelp: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple.
quotes.builderNoActive: No active pricing version. Seed one first.
quotes.sentLinkHelp: Copy this into the email to the customer. The link is valid until the quote expires.
quotes.reshareHelp: Fresh acceptance link — copy and paste into your reply.

reshareError.wrong_status: Only sent quotes can be re-shared.
reshareError.unknown: Could not generate a fresh link — please retry.

withdrawError.wrong_status: Only draft or sent quotes can be withdrawn.

quotes.detailNoSnapshot: No engine snapshot stored for this quote.

variants.empty: No variants yet — the customer will see only the headline price.
variants.label: Label
variants.labelPlaceholder: e.g. Pickup only, Full service, Premium
variants.descriptionPlaceholder: What's included or excluded vs. the standard option

error.invalid_input: Check the inputs and try again.
error.wrong_status: Variants can only be added to draft or sent quotes.

publicQuote.headline: Hi {name}, here is your moving quote
publicQuote.surveyHint: We'd like to do a quick survey before move day to make sure the price holds. We'll be in touch.
publicQuote.chooseVariant: Pick the option that suits you:
publicQuote.formIntro: Confirm your name and tick the box to e-sign. We'll lock the price in and reach out to confirm details.
publicQuote.consentTerms: I accept the quote and the standard terms & conditions.
publicQuote.thanksTitle: Thanks — your quote is locked in
publicQuote.thanksBody: We'll be in touch shortly to confirm the move details.
publicQuote.alreadyAcceptedBody: Thanks — this quote has already been accepted. Reach out if you need anything.
publicQuote.expiredBody: Please get back in touch and we'll send a fresh price.
publicQuote.declinedBody: This quote is no longer available. Please contact us for an up-to-date price.
publicQuote.invalidBody: This link looks malformed. Please use the most recent link from your email.
publicQuote.notFoundBody: We could not find this quote. It may have been withdrawn.
publicQuote.unavailableBody: Online quote acceptance isn't configured yet. Please contact the office.
publicQuote.invalidLink: Link invalid — please use the most recent email.
publicQuote.expiredLink: Link expired — please request a new quote.
publicQuote.tryAgain: Could not accept right now. Please try again.
publicQuote.declineToggle: Not for you? Let us know.
publicQuote.declineFormIntro: If you've decided this isn't for you, we'd love to know why. Optional — leave blank if you'd rather not say.
publicQuote.declineReasonPlaceholder: e.g. went with another mover, dates changed, price
publicQuote.declineThanksBody: Appreciate the heads-up. If anything changes, just reply to the email and we'll send a fresh quote.
publicQuote.footer: Questions? Reply to the email this link came from.

printQuote.title: Quote summary
printQuote.optionsHint: Compare on paper, then accept your preferred option from the link in your email.
printQuote.howToAcceptBody: Open the link from your email and click Accept. We'll confirm details by phone before move day.

sla.title: SLA queue
sla.subtitleAll: Leads still waiting on a first response, sorted by deadline.
sla.subtitleSelf: Your leads still waiting on a first response.
sla.empty: No leads waiting on a response. Nice.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Every stage change, note, call, and quote event for this job, newest first.
timeline.empty: Nothing has happened on this job yet.

notes.placeholder: Add a note. Internal by default — tick the box to share with the customer.
notes.visibilityHelp: Internal notes stay between staff. Customer-visible notes appear on the acceptance page.

documents.dropHint: Drop a file here or click to choose

phoneCalls.empty: No calls logged yet for this job.
phoneCalls.nextActionPlaceholder: e.g. call back with survey slot

smoke.title: Smoke tests
smoke.subtitle: Phase 00 gate — all 4 must pass on production Workers
